title: Master Data Management (MDM) Process Flow
description: A visual representation of the key stages and components involved in managing master data within a data warehouse environment.
relationships: Data is extracted from multiple Source Systems
Data is cleansed and standardized in the Staging Area
Master data is consolidated into a single 'Golden Record' in the MDM Hub
The authoritative Golden Record is loaded into the Data Warehouse
The Data Warehouse feeds clean, consistent master data to Business Intelligence Tools for reporting and analysis
